docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-20-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 W. TRUPEK (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JUN-21-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, CHRISTINA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEBRUARY 10, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE: SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,744.55 FILED BY ALVARADO, SHAWN AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-10-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHAWN ALVARADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA TOWNSEND IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. SETTLEMENT IS REACHED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1447.27, WHICH INCLUDES COURT COSTS. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES DEFENDANT HER CORRECT MAILING ADDRESS. A PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET. IF PAYMENT IS PAID IN FULL, NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT RECIEVED, A JUDGMENT WILL BE RENDERED AT THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
